## What does this PR do?

## Rule changes
- [ ] New rule(s) added
- [ ] Existing rule(s) modified
- [ ] Rule(s) deprecated

## Checklist
- [ ] Rule follows ATR schema (spec/atr-schema.yaml)
- [ ] At least 5 true positive test cases
- [ ] At least 3 true negative test cases
- [ ] At least 2 false positive scenarios listed
- [ ] OWASP/MITRE references included
- [ ] Description is at least 3 sentences
- [ ] `npm test` passes
